# SUMO Installer `.deb` Package Builder

This project creates a Debian `.deb` package that, when installed, automatically 
adds the [SUMO (Simulation of Urban MObility)](https://www.eclipse.dev/sumo/) 
PPA repository and installs SUMO and its associated tools.

⚠️ **Important:** This package is intended for internal use in the 
ADORe build system. It does **not follow Debian packaging policies**, because it modifies 
APT sources and performs package installations in its `postinst` script. The 
output is not intended to be published out of context.
---

## 🛠 What This Does

When you build and install the `.deb` generated by this project, it will:

1. Run a `postinst` script automatically after installation.
2. Add the official SUMO PPA:
```bash
sudo add-apt-repository -y ppa:sumo/stable
sudo apt-get update
sudo apt-get install -y sumo sumo-tools sumo-doc
```
